rows.label: qev025701_MSG0001
rows.name:
Our brand, Belle Betty Style, develops
products for women, by women.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_MSG0002
rows.name:
However, that has only ever
applied to Earthlings...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_MSG0003
rows.name:
To succeed on Mira, we need Ma-non women
to start using our products as well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_MSG0004
rows.name:
That's why I came to scout
Panyal here as the leader of
our Ma-non sales division![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_MSG0005
rows.name:
Hiiiii! Leave it to me! The fashion
charisma, Panyal, is going to revolutionize
the Ma-non apparel world, you know![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_MSG0006
rows.name:
But, but! How does Ma-non fashion look from
your perspective, You? Doesn't it look like
everyone is wearing the exact same thing?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_JNK0010
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev025701_SEL0011
rows.name: Answer that it does look the same.

rows.label: qev025701_JNK0020
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev025701_SEL0021
rows.name: Praise it as having a unique flavor.

rows.label: qev025701_MSG0007
rows.name:
I know, right?! You have
amazing taste, You![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_MSG0008
rows.name:
After all, Ma-non don't have the custom
of wearing clothes tailored to their exact
sizes like Earthlings do, You know![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_MSG0009
rows.name:
Really? I'm going to have to put a
question mark on your taste, You![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_MSG0010
rows.name:
After all, Ma-non don't have the custom
of wearing clothes tailored to their exact
sizes like Earthlings do, You know![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_MSG0011
rows.name:
We just throw them on however,
and they end up too baggy...
It's totally uncool, isn't it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_MSG0012
rows.name:
...Ah, I know! Hey, Victoria, why
don't we try making Ma-non versions
of the underwear Earthlings wear?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_MSG0013
rows.name:
The idea of being fashionable
where no one can see it is
absolutely fantastic, isn't it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_MSG0014
rows.name:
I see, that sounds interesting. But to make
underwear, we'll need to investigate the
standard three sizes of Ma-non women.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_MSG0015
rows.name:
If that's the case, we
can just ask my friends![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_MSG0016
rows.name:
...Since that's decided, hey,
You! Could you go ask three Ma-non
in NLA for their three sizes?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_JNK0030
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: qev025701_SEL0031
rows.name:
Ask if it's really that easy
to get someone's three sizes.

rows.label: qev025701_JNK0040
rows.name: Embarrassment

rows.label: qev025701_SEL0041
rows.name: Refuse, saying it's too embarrassing.

rows.label: qev025701_MSG0017
rows.name:
Do Earthlings keep things like
that a secret? I think that's
pretty stingy, don't you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_MSG0018
rows.name:
If they're Ma-non, it's totally fine! We don't
really care about that sort of thing, you know!
Right? It's fine, isn't it? Please, I'm begging you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_MSG0019
rows.name:
Why would you be embarrassed?
It's just data, isn't it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_MSG0020
rows.name:
Ma-non don't care about that sort of thing, so
there's no need for You to be embarrassed either!
So go check it out, alright? I'm busy over here![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_MSG0021
rows.name:
She's right, Panyal and I need to
have a design meeting immediately...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_MSG0022
rows.name:
I know this is sudden, but could you cooperate
with this project? Let's stir up a whirlwind
in the NLA apparel world together.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_MSG0023
rows.name:
Aside from the three sizes data, we also need
Smooth Leather as material for the underwear.
Could you gather some of that as well?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_MSG0024
rows.name:
I appreciate your cooperation. Our
division is brand new, so we're
severely lacking in manpower.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_MSG0025
rows.name:
Thank you, thank you! Alright, I'll tell
you the names of my friends who will
probably give you their three sizes![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_MSG0026
rows.name:
The junior representative is Beberta!
The misses representative is Aalis! And
the madam representative is Biiponne![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_MSG0027
rows.name:
I think they're all somewhere
in NLA, so go interview them
for their three sizes![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_MSG0028
rows.name:
Underwear designed for Ma-non who have
never worn it before... If this goes
well, we can expect huge demand.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_MSG0029
rows.name:
Yes, scouting Panyal really
was the right move.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_MSG0030
rows.name:
Are you done investigating the Ma-non
women? In that case, all we need is the
Smooth Leather for the underwear material.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_MSG0031
rows.name:
I asked an acquaintance in BLADE,
and apparently you can get it from
a native creature called Fontera.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_MSG0032
rows.name:
Panyal really is interesting.
She comes up with one innovative
idea after another.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_MSG0033
rows.name:
Hehe, if we give shape to her
ideas, I'm sure we can create
truly revolutionary underwear.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_MSG0034
rows.name:
...So, how did it go on your end? Did you
get the underwear materials and the three
sizes data from the Ma-non women?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_MSG0035
rows.name:
Yes, this is plenty! I'll start
making the samples right away.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_MSG0036
rows.name:
That's right... Hey, Panyal?
Once it's finished, would you
be the first to try it on?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_MSG0037
rows.name:
Alright! I'm so happy to be the first
Ma-non to wear underwear, You know![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_MSG0038
rows.name:
Just wait a moment, then. I'll whip up
some fabulous underwear right away.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_MSG0039
rows.name:
...It's done! Alright, Panyal.
Go ahead and try it on.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_MSG0040
rows.name:
Okay! I'll go change right
now! I'm really looking forward
to seeing how it feels![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_MSG0041
rows.name: …………[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_MSG0042
rows.name: Gwah! Gyaaaaaaaaah![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_MSG0043
rows.name:
What is this?! It's squeezing me
and it hurts so much! This isn't
fashion, it's a restraint device?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_MSG0044
rows.name:
Do You wear things like this too?!
Isn't it incredibly painful?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_JNK0050
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev025701_SEL0051
rows.name:
State that you don't
feel any discomfort.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_JNK0060
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev025701_SEL0061
rows.name:
Say you somewhat
understand how she feels.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_MSG0045
rows.name: You are absolutely amazing, aren't You![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_MSG0046
rows.name:
Uugh... I definitely can't stand
being squeezed like this forever!
I'm taking this right off![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_MSG0047
rows.name:
I know, right?! This squeezing
feeling... I can't stand it!
I'm taking this right off![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_MSG0048
rows.name:
Do You wear things like this too?!
Isn't it incredibly painful?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_JNK0070
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev025701_SEL0071
rows.name:
Explain that men don't wear
underwear that squeezes them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_JNK0080
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev025701_SEL0081
rows.name:
Say you somewhat
understand how she feels.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_MSG0049
rows.name:
Boys and girls wear different
types?! Hmmm, Earthling girls
sure have it tough, don't they![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_MSG0050
rows.name:
This squeezing feeling... I can't
stand it! I'm taking this right off![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_MSG0051
rows.name: ...Eh?! You wear women's underwear too?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_MSG0052
rows.name:
No, it's fine... People with
your tastes are important
customers too, after all...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_MSG0053
rows.name:
Uugh... Even I can't stand this!
I'm taking this right off![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_MSG0054
rows.name:
Phew... I thought I was gonna die!
No matter how fashionable it is,
this is impossible, isn't it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_MSG0055
rows.name:
I see... I suppose jumping straight into
intimate wear was too high of a hurdle?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_MSG0056
rows.name:
If that's the case, what else is
there... Cosmetics for Ma-non?
Could that be a viable approach?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_MSG0057
rows.name:
...Come to think of it, Victoria smells
really nice, unlike other Earthlings.
Is that something you were born with?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_MSG0058
rows.name:
This is called perfume. I spray myself
with water that has a scent I like.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_MSG0059
rows.name:
Ooh! So that's another form of invisible
fashion? That's incredibly excellent![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_MSG0060
rows.name:
If it's something like that, I'm
sure Ma-non will love it too![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_MSG0061
rows.name:
A perfume with a scent that Ma-non like...
Yes, I think that sounds interesting.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_MSG0062
rows.name:
Hey, You! In that case, hurry and
fetch something with a scent we like![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_MSG0063
rows.name:
Then I'll make a seriously
killer perfume out of it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_MSG0064
rows.name:
What Panyal wants are Sona Herbs and
Waldo Cherries. I believe Sona Herbs
can be found on Northmost Beach.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_MSG0065
rows.name:
And Waldo Cherries should be around
Janpath Lake. Yes—I wonder what
kind of scent it will have.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025701_MSG0066
rows.name:
Did you fetch something good? Then
please hand it over to Panyal.[ST:wait ]
